headline: Archrock Appoints Mohit Singh Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
summary: HOUSTON, June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Archrock, Inc. (NYSE:AROC) today announced that Mohit Singh has been appointed Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective July 6, 2026. Mr. Singh brings more than 25 years of experience across the energy value chain, with expertise in oil & gas operations, investment banking and corporate finance. He served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Chesapeake Energy Corporation from 2021 through its merger with Southwe
